summary: Iteration 169 - Surf Passport Frontend UI Testing COMPLETE. All 11 features tested and verified. Passport button visible in sidebar with emerald/green color, positioned above Profile. Modal opens correctly showing user level, XP progress bar, 3 tabs (My Stamps, Leaderboard, Travel), stats grid, GPS check-in banner, and close button works properly.

minor.issue: 404 errors in console - bookings endpoint returning 404 (pre-existing issue, not related to Passport feature)

critical_code_review_comments: Passport button correctly positioned in sidebar above Profile button
Passport button has emerald/green highlight color (text-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-500/10)
Modal opens with proper z-index (z-[200]) and backdrop blur
User level and XP progress bar displayed correctly (Level 1: Grommet, 0 XP, 500 XP to next level)
3 tabs implemented: My Stamps, Leaderboard, Travel
My Stamps tab shows stats grid: Spots Visited, Countries, Total Check-ins, Day Streak
My Stamps tab shows empty state 'No stamps yet' when user has no check-ins
Leaderboard tab shows 4 category tabs: Spots, Countries, XP, Streak
Travel tab shows 'Coming Soon' placeholder with Surf Travel Hub title
GPS check-in banner shows location error (expected in test environment)
Close button (X) works correctly to dismiss modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Surf Passport Frontend UI fully implemented and tested. Passport button in sidebar (emerald color, above Profile). Modal has 3 tabs: My Stamps (stats grid + recent stamps), Leaderboard (4 categories), Travel (Coming Soon). GPS check-in banner shows location status. All UI elements working correctly.

modal_level_xp.details: Level 1: Grommet, 0 XP, 500 XP to next level

modal_3_tabs.description: Modal has 3 tabs: My Stamps, Leaderboard, Travel

my_stamps_empty_state.message: No stamps yet - Visit a surf spot and check in to collect your first stamp!

leaderboard_categories.description: Leaderboard tab shows category tabs (spots, countries, xp, streak)

gps_checkin_banner.description: GPS check-in banner shows location status
gps_checkin_banner.test_env_message: Unable to get location. Please enable GPS.
